pages.text: $(italic)Tinkers' Construct$() — the Smeltery grown larger: seared-stone machinery, fuels, and the heat that tougher metals demand.$(br2)$(bold)To obtain:$() not crafted but $(italic)cast$() — lay a $(italic)Book$() on a Casting Table and pour molten seared stone over it.
pages.title: Mighty Smelting
